title: IN2025_13.1.0.590(EX01)is available
description:
New version:IN2025_13.1.0.590(EX01)

This update improves system security.

System

• Integrates the June 2024 Android security patch to enhance system security.

• Improves system stability.

Please do not turn off your device while the update is installing. During Installation you cannot use your device at all, even to dial 9-1-1
